control: Production gross leverage fixed at 1.405x for 10% target vol
pillar5_evidence: 5.1 selected 10% vol target, k=0.7025, production gross=1.405x.
current_v3_status: Keep static gross cap at 1.405x until V4 dynamic sizing is approved.
v4_requirement: Hard gross cap in order generation and daily risk report.

pillar5_evidence: 5.1 showed static 10% target can realize ~26% 60d vol in high-vol regimes.
current_v3_status: Evaluate dynamic vol targeting, but do not use a blunt high-vol off switch because 5.6 found high-vol Sharpe is strong.
v4_requirement: Backtest dynamic vol overlay without reducing SPY 20d vol top-quartile Sharpe below current baseline.

control: Turnover cap / no-trade band in neutralization optimizer
pillar5_evidence: 5.4 capacity ceiling <$5M is driven by tail rotation days; non-rebalance turnover 27.4% vs rebalance 7.0%.
current_v3_status: Add turnover penalty or no-trade band to daily beta-neutralization / sector-cap solve.
v4_requirement: Non-rebalance-day mean turnover < 2x rebalance-day mean turnover; >100% turnover days reduced by at least 75%.

control: Participation cap by name and day
pillar5_evidence: 5.4 p95 participation breaches quickly; mid-cap names such as APH/MOS/PTC/OKE bind capacity.
current_v3_status: Enforce projected participation limit before orders are released.
v4_requirement: No order plan exceeds 5% ADV participation without explicit PM/risk approval.

control: Sector net constraint after beta-neutral solve
pillar5_evidence: 5.5 found post-V3 max abs sector net 14.1% vs raw 7.5%; beta-neutralization widened sector net exposure.
current_v3_status: Constrain sector net exposure inside the beta-neutral optimizer, not only as a side cap.
v4_requirement: Post-solve average max abs sector net <= raw baseline and p95 max abs sector net <= 15%.

pillar5_evidence: 5.5 residual alpha beta=0.269; 5.6 found 2022 rate shock had |beta|>0.4 on 56.6% of days.
current_v3_status: Compute rolling 60d realized beta daily and alert on drift.
v4_requirement: Warn at |beta_60d| > 0.25; hard review at |beta_60d| > 0.40 for 5 consecutive days.

pillar5_evidence: 5.6 COVID crash shows zero high-beta days under 60d threshold, likely because 60d beta smooths fast events.
current_v3_status: Add 20d realized beta monitor alongside 60d to catch fast dislocations.
v4_requirement: Warn at |beta_20d| > 0.30; hard review at |beta_20d| > 0.50 for 3 consecutive days.

pillar5_evidence: 5.6 refuted high-vol weakness; weak regime is SPY 60d return bottom quartile, Sharpe=-0.074 over 677 days.
current_v3_status: Compute daily SPY 60d trailing return percentile vs trailing 3y distribution and reduce sizing in bottom quartile.
v4_requirement: When SPY 60d trend percentile is bottom quartile, V4 regime-conditioned Sharpe >= 0 and drawdown improves vs V3.

control: Do not use blunt high-vol kill filter
pillar5_evidence: 5.6 found SPY 20d vol top-quartile Sharpe=1.624 vs bottom-quartile Sharpe=0.500.
current_v3_status: High vol alone is not a de-risk trigger; use trend and realized risk jointly.
v4_requirement: Risk policy states vol-only filter is informational, not automatic sizing reduction.

pillar5_evidence: 5.5 could not prove residual alpha is not hidden size/value/momentum exposure because canonical factor returns are unavailable.
current_v3_status: Source or build approved factor-return tape for institutional attribution.
v4_requirement: Daily size/value/momentum factor returns available and reconciled to attribution engine.

pillar5_evidence: Pillar 5 covered DD and stress windows but did not implement formal VaR/ES limits.
current_v3_status: Add rolling historical VaR/ES risk budget before live launch.
v4_requirement: Daily 95/99% VaR and ES produced, with breach escalation and PM signoff.

pillar5_evidence: 5.4 found top-10 short concentration=48.7%, structurally independent of AUM.
current_v3_status: Add explicit short-side concentration constraint.
v4_requirement: Top-10 short concentration <= 25%; no single short > 5% of short book absent approval.

pillar5_evidence: 5.4 HTB-proxy share=25.5%, near the 30% borrow-feasible threshold.
current_v3_status: Replace market-cap/ADV proxy with PB borrow feed and enforce HTB cap.
v4_requirement: HTB notional < 25% of short book using PB locate/utilization data.

pillar5_evidence: 5.3 break-even borrow cost is ~700 bps, robust but analytic and not PB-confirmed.
current_v3_status: Track realized borrow fees and rerun borrow stress weekly.
v4_requirement: Daily borrow fee file available; projected fee drag included in pre-trade P&L.

pillar5_evidence: 5.6 worst requested window return=-9.1%; institutional review should occur before -20% kill switch.
current_v3_status: Add soft halt requiring PM/risk review at -10% rolling 60d drawdown.
v4_requirement: Automated alert and documented review before next rebalance after breach.

pillar5_evidence: 5.2 hard stop was -12% de-risk and kill switch -20%; 5.7 adds institutional hard halt tier.
current_v3_status: Define hard halt action: freeze new risk or cut gross by at least 50%.
v4_requirement: Policy implemented and historically simulated before paper trading.

pillar5_evidence: Single-day operational loss limit was not defined in 5.1-5.6.
current_v3_status: Add -8% single-day loss halt with immediate order freeze and risk review.
v4_requirement: Intraday/close-to-close loss monitor triggers order block and incident ticket.

control: Existing -20% kill switch retained as capital-preservation backstop
pillar5_evidence: 5.2 and 5.6 found no tested window breaches -20%; still useful as terminal kill switch.
current_v3_status: Keep -20% kill switch but do not rely on it as first review point.
v4_requirement: Policy includes -10%, -15%, and -20% tiers with explicit actions.

pillar5_evidence: 5.4 shows impact is capacity-binding because of tail rotation days.
current_v3_status: Compare realized execution cost to modeled square-root impact daily.
v4_requirement: Daily slippage report by name, order, sector, and rotation-day tag.

pillar5_evidence: 5.5 found reconstructed Stage 4.5 V3 does not exactly match locked Pillar 5 cache.
current_v3_status: Decide and document canonical production book path; deprecate the other path.
v4_requirement: One reproducible command regenerates locked V3 weights bit-for-bit or documents intentional versioning.

pillar5_evidence: Pillar 5 uses existing processed prices; live launch needs automated PIT validation.
current_v3_status: Add PIT validation checks for prices, returns, and corporate-action adjustments.
v4_requirement: Daily data audit passes before signal generation.

pillar5_evidence: Pillar 4/5 universe construction uses available processed data; launch needs explicit survivorship audit.
current_v3_status: Document universe membership and delisting treatment.
v4_requirement: Universe audit report generated for backtest and paper-trading periods.

pillar5_evidence: 5.4 capacity relies on ADV20; live capacity should re-evaluate ADV around earnings/events.
current_v3_status: Refresh ADV20 daily and block stale liquidity estimates.
v4_requirement: No order generated if ADV20 missing/stale; event-day liquidity override documented.
